infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: This app needs access to your microphone to transcribe voice input for meal descriptions.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: This app needs access to speech recognition to convert your voice into text for meal descriptions.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app needs access to your camera to take photos of your meals.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app needs access to your photo library to select photos of your meals.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow MacroGoal to access your camera to take photos of your meals.
plugins.microphonePermission: Allow MacroGoal to access your microphone for voice input.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow MacroGoal to access your photos to select meal images.
